content.en:
Soon.

Ye Tian came to the side of the Secret Domain, and then found a special place suitable for cultivating the ultimate system of the Secret Domain-the Blood Cave of the Secret Domain.

The Mysterious Blood Cave is a very peculiar place, and it is under its influence that the Mysterious Heaven and Earth gradually gave birth to the Extreme System of the Mysterious Domain.

In fact, the Blood Cave of the Trick is the source of the ultimate system of the Trick Domain.

However.

The Ultimate Lord who came out of the Secret Realm Heaven and Earth, after learning that the Secret Realm Ultimate System was so dangerous, did not dare to continue to cultivate the Secret Realm Ultimate System, but cultivated other Ultimate Systems, such as the Transcendent Realm Ultimate System.

So.

When Ye Tian came to the Secret Blood Cave, he only sensed the existence of a few Nine Realms peaks, they were not ready to comprehend the ultimate rules of the Trick, they only wanted to cultivate the Extreme Body of the Trick to the Xiaocheng realm, then they could give up this ultimate system.

Ye Tian's arrival, and "Nine Three Zero" did not arouse their concern, they were still practicing silently.

Ye Tian entered the Blood Cave of Return, found a position, and began to comprehend the ultimate system of the Secret Domain.

The Mysterious Blood Cave is also dangerous, and some tricks are born here from time to time, and the strength of these tricks is not weak.

After a while, a group of tricks appeared, but they were easily killed by Ye Tian.

These treacherous creatures may be able to threaten the ordinary Ultimate Lord, but they are no threat to Ye Tian, he can suppress them with just his breath.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian worked hard to improve the ultimate system, and the system of the ultimate system was constantly improving, and the ultimate will was constantly improving.

After a long time, the ultimate body of the treacherous reaches the realm of Xiaocheng, and the ultimate will is also improved, and then you have to comprehend the ultimate rules of the treacherous.

This is an extremely important step!

Time flies.

Another long time has passed.

this day.

Airplanes!!!!!

The ultimate rule of treachery was comprehended by Ye Tian, and just when he comprehended the ultimate rule of treachery, he saw the end of the ultimate system of treachery, a broken corpse and a blood shadow.

The corpse represents the Blood Demon Extreme Venerable who once reached the Ultimate Realm Lord in the Extreme Rule System of the Trickery, and the other party has fallen, which means that this path can be continued.

"The blood shadow hasn't moved, it seems that you can really avoid the blood shadow!"

Ye Tian smiled.

Soon, he could continue to comprehend the ultimate rules of treachery.

With his talent and the Stone of the Eternal Night, he was able to comprehend the Ultimate Rule of Trickery very efficiently.

The ultimate rule of the twofold treacherous!

The ultimate rule of the triple treachery!

Ye Tian continued to improve the ultimate rules of treachery, and the ultimate will was also growing and improving, gradually reaching the standard of impacting the ultimate realm master, but he still wanted to continue to improve and raise the ultimate rules of treachery to the ninefold realm.

At that time, his ultimate will would be raised to an extremely terrifying level, and the hope of the Yuanxing Ultimate System breaking through to the Ultimate Realm Lord would be even greater.

However, when Ye Tian comprehended the sevenfold ultimate rule and wanted to continue to improve, he sensed the danger, if he continued to improve, it would attract blood shadows.

"That's right, threat!"

Ye Tianming came to his senses.

Before, his treacherous ultimate rules were still very weak, and he would be considered by the blood shadow to be the same kind, and the weak ones naturally didn't need to care.

But if it threatens its own kind, it must be wiped out.

"It's no wonder that the peak powerhouse of the Nine Realms who avoided the blood shadow didn't continue to comprehend the ultimate rules of treachery here, it seems that the other party has also risen to this level and sensed the danger, so he gave up. Ye Tian said darkly.

This problem should not be understood by the Giant Axe Extreme Venerable, and it cannot be solved.

"Forget it, anyway, my current ultimate will has skyrocketed a lot, and it is enough to impact the standard of the ultimate realm master, so I will temporarily give up cultivating the ultimate system of the subterfuge realm!"

Ye Tian still had to continue to comprehend the Ultimate Rules of the Abyss Star.

In these long years, he has cultivated a lot of Ultimate Systems at the same time, and the time for the Yuanxing Ultimate System to comprehend is much less, but it has also been promoted to the Eightfold Realm, and he wants to cultivate the Yuanxing Ultimate System to the Consummation Realm in one go.

And so.

Ye Tian began to spend all his time on the ultimate rules of the Enlightenment Abyss Star.

And just like that, another long time passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Abyss Ultimate System had finally completed a breakthrough, comprehending the Ninefold Ultimate Rules, and his Abyssal Star Ultimate Body had also begun to break through.

Ye Tian's body began to frantically absorb the power of the main body of the Abyssal Star, and the ultimate body of the Abyssal Star gradually transformed to the realm of perfection, and his physical fitness far surpassed the past.

"It is worthy of the Yuanxing Ultimate System, and the increase in the body is too great!"

Ye Tian felt that his strength had improved a lot.....

......

"Consummate the Abyss Star Ultimate Body, he actually comprehended the Nine Abyss Star Ultimate Rules, this comprehension speed is too fast, I have just comprehended the One Abyss Star Ultimate Rules, and the Abyss Star Ultimate Body has just reached the Dacheng realm. "The Giant Axe Extreme Venerable is a little jealous.

He felt that if Ye Tian wanted to attack the Ultimate Realm Lord, he should be qualified enough.

It's just not clear, when Ye Tian will impact the Ultimate Realm Lord Realm.

Void Heaven Palace.

Ye Tian came to find Lord Duomi.

"Lord Duomi, I want to meet the Ultimate Realm Lords. "

Ye Tian pleaded.

Duo Mi glanced at Ye Tian and said, "Ye Tian Realm Lord, do you want to attack the Ultimate Realm Lord?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tianying said.

"Okay, I'll take you to meet my master, Yinduo Jizun!"

Subsequently, Duo Mi took Ye Tian to an ultimate void in the depths of the Void Heaven Palace, and saw Yinduo Jizun.

"I've seen the Yinduo Extreme Venerable Palace Master!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, sit down!"

Yinduo Jizun said to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian sat down.

Immediately, Duomi left.

"Yinduo Extreme Venerable Palace Master, I'm ready to attack the Ultimate Realm Lord, I don't know what else I need to prepare?"

He felt that he was very prepared to attack the Ultimate Realm Lord, but he was afraid that the breakthrough process had some special secrets, which would lead to the failure of the breakthrough, so he had to ask Yinduo Jizun.

As for the 4.6 Giant Axe Pole, it was not a force, so he was naturally not at ease, so he didn't ask the other party.

"Your accumulation is indeed enough, even far beyond the Nine Realms peak that is qualified to impact the Ultimate Realm Lord, but if you want to impact the Ultimate Realm Lord, you have to wait for the Ultimate Ancient Sea to appear, and then go to the Ultimate Realm Lord Realm!" Yinduo Extreme Venerable proposed.

"Ultimate Ancient Sea, what kind of place is that?"

Ye Tian asked.

"The Ultimate Ancient Sea is a special treasure land, it will only appear once in a long time, and the success rate of impacting the Ultimate Realm Lord in the Ultimate Ancient Sea will be about thirty percent higher, so many Nine Realm Peaks who are qualified to impact the Ultimate Realm Lord will wait for it to open, after all, there is a thirty percent chance of more, and no one is willing to wait for some more years. Yinduo Jizun said.

"How long will the Ultimate Ancient Sea remain?"

Ye Tian asked again.
